meta.name: Team Sentiment Monitor
meta.description: Collect anonymous team pulse check responses weekly, calculate sentiment scores, detect trends, and alert leadership when team health drops below threshold.

parameters.content:
## 45 — Team Sentiment Monitor

**Required:**
- PULSE_SHEET_ID: columns week, respondent_id (anonymous), score (1-10), morale (1-10), alignment (1-10), comment
- PULSE_ALERT_THRESHOLD: average score below which to alert (default: 6.0)
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Friday at 18:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: {{ $json.alert ? '⚠️ TEAM ALERT' : '💚 Team Pulse' }} {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.avg_score }}/10 ({{ $json.respondents }} responses)
